sourceSummary.oneLine: Coordinate spreadsheet listing reference designators, X/Y positions, orientation, layer, part type, decal, pins, SMD status, and glued status for BLUE_1417_ROIC_12140.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports PCB assembly, inspection, and DHF electrical design traceability by defining component placement coordinates and attributes.
keyPoints: Header fields are RefDes, X, Y, Orient., Layer, PartType, PartDecal, Pins, SMD, and Glued.
The placement list includes top and bottom layer components.
The list includes SMD components, through-hole features, connectors, pads, test points, ICs, capacitors, resistors, diodes, and ferrite beads.
The source path identifies the file as Rev.02 dated 2024.07.05.

The placement list records SMD status for components.

The placement list includes through-hole entries that are not SMD.
The placement list includes connector entries with 52 pins.
The placement list includes integrated circuit entries with package/decal information.
